Frost Cavern, Kalos (location)

This is the Pokémon Location guide for Frost Cavern in Kalos.

Choose which generation of games you're playing to see the Pokémon and capture methods.

  • Generation 6
  • 1F
  • 2F
  • 3F
  • Outside

Generation 6 - 1F

Walking

Walking in grass or a cave

Pokémon Games Rarity Levels Details
Piloswine XY 38-39
Beartic XY 39-40
Bergmite XY 39-40
Cryogonal XY 40

Jynx XY 39-40
Horde encounter
Vanillite XY 20
Smoochum XY 21
Cubchoo XY 20
